functions.title: Guide Book #88
functions.author: Forsaken Odyssey
pages:
§7Guide Book #88§r
§lCrimson Mushlings§r
§8MOB§r
 
•§lRarity§r: Common
•§lBehavior§r: Passive
•§lMob type§r: Mushling, Myconid, Nature-elemental, Magical.
•§lSpawns in§r: Crimson Forest
•§lHealth§r: 12 §o(Wild)§r

22 §o(Tamed)§r
•§lWalk speed§r: 0.25
•§lBreathes in§r: Air
•§lTempted by§r: Azalea, Flowering Azalea.
•§lHealed by§r: Azalea, Flowering Azalea.
•§lBreed with§r: Azalea
•§lAging by§r: Azalea, Flowering Azalea.

•§lTamed by§r: Flowering Azalea
•§lPossible drops§r: Crimson Fungus, XP Orbs.
•They can release a §lNausea Effect§r around themselves after being hit.
•Wild Mushling can randomly sit.
•Tamed Mushling can be sat down.

•Tamed Crimson Mushling can randomly spawn a §lCrimson Fungus§r.
•They can slowly regenerate their health when they sit or sleep.
